archetypes.evidence: Failing path dry-run: gauntlet phase caller invokes gauntlet/model_dispatch.call_model(); the target architecture keeps the public return contract as (content, input_tokens, output_tokens), moves the accounting write into call_model after successful model dispatch, and requires token_tracking.tracker call-time resolution. This exercises source-of-truth ownership, API compatibility, tuple validation, and test patch-point invariants.
archetypes.notes: This is an architectural dry-run before implementation. Current source still contains CostTracker/cost_tracker references until the execution cards apply the spec.

archetypes.evidence: Sibling path dry-run: CLI-visible cost summary reads remain stable because total_cost, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, by_model, and summary() stay on token_tracking.tracker. CLI parsing/model validation stays in existing debate and gauntlet dispatch code; no new CLI flags or command behavior are introduced.
archetypes.notes: Read-only sibling path selected to verify that moving the write owner does not change CLI output contracts.
